name: apple-stocks-mcp
description: Read your macOS Apple Stocks app data locally: watchlist, quotes, fundamentals and intraday charts. Read-only, no network, no API keys.

interface.shortDescription: Your macOS Apple Stocks data, read locally — watchlist, quotes, fundamentals, charts.
interface.longDescription: A macOS-only MCP server that reads the data your pre-installed Apple Stocks app already cached on your Mac: your watchlist, quotes, fundamentals (P/E, EPS, dividend, 52-week range, market cap) and intraday charts. 100% local and read-only — no network requests, no external API, no API keys, no telemetry. Not affiliated with Apple Inc.
defaultPrompt: What's the Apple stock doing today?
Summarize my Apple Stocks watchlist and the biggest movers.
Show me the fundamentals for NVDA.
